description.plain: About this item Embark on a fishing adventure like no other with our 12 feet (144 inches) Boss 12 SS (Gray Swirl) sit on top fishing kayak for adults. Crafted with precision and passion, this kayak embodies unparalleled features that set it apart. This kayak weighs 78 lbs (35 kg) and it has a capacity of carrying weight up to 500 lbs (227 kg). The innovative catamaran hull design ensures a stable platform, offering you the confidence to cast, reel, and stand with ease. Discover generous storage space at the front, back, and below deck, accommodating all your fishing gear and essentials. Unleash your fishing potential with one swivel and four flush mount rod holders, a testament to convenience and readiness. The fold-down seat, equipped with a stand-up assist strap, delivers comfort and maneuverability. Universal mounting plates, carry handles, and paddle holders ensure you're fully equipped for the waters. Crafted from rugged UV-stabilized fortiflex high density polyethylene, this kayak's durability ensures countless adventures, making it an investment in years of outdoor enjoyment. Proudly made in the USA, this kayak blends craftsmanship and innovation. It's not just a vessel, it's a gateway to exciting explorations and hidden fishing spots. With this kayak, you are acquiring a piece of waterborne artistry designed to enhance every aspect of your aquatic experiences. Catamaran hull design with a flat stable platform. Front/rear storage wells large enough for a milk crate or bucket. Non-slip pads and stand up assist strap. One swivel and four flush mount rod holders. Generous below deck storage. Universal mounting plates. Adjustable foot braces. Carry handles and paddle holders. description.plain: Enjoy your local waterways in the Sun Dolphin Simcoe 10.4 sit-in kayak. It features adjustable step-lock footrests, adjustable seat back, and padded seat bottom for peak comfort. The Simcoe 10.4 kayak has a wide cockpit that is non-confining and offers plenty of space. The large size helps make for easy entry and exit as well. This 10 ft. kayak was designed to move with ease across the water and is ideal for a variety of environments thanks to the high performance unibody dihedral hull. Convenient storage features include an extra deep rear storage well recessed to fit a 5-gallon bucket, a molded-in dashboard, two cup holders for your favorite drinks, and a front dry storage compartment for necessities. For additional information on this product, please see the Product Documents section for all downloadable user manuals, installation guides, brochures and warranty statements. One-person sit-in recreational kayak Blowmold unibody dihedral hull Front and rear bungee systems Carry handles at bow and stern Dashboard storage tray with item holder Molded-in beverage holder Paddle keeper (one paddle included) Adjustable seat back Padded seat bottom Large rear storage well Front storage hatch Size: 124 in. x 31 in. x 12.25 in. Weight: 47 lbs. Capacity: 325 lbs. Color: Tequila Sunrise Designed, Molded, & Assembled in the USA

description.plain: #lang1: Réserver un kayak avec un dépôt de 50$, balance payable à réception Cliquez ici pour une Cotation de Transport "MATCH" de Prix avec un conseil averti Financement AFFIRM est disponible Dim: 10 x 34" x 14.6" Poids: 63lbs avec siège et système de pédale 93lbs Capacité: 308lbs *Notez que tous nos kayaks à pédales sont dotés d’un système de direction et d’un gouvernail en aluminium, ce qui nous différencie nettement de nos concurrents. Cette vidéo est le modèle Propulse qui a des differences esthetiques du propel. Le propel manque le tapis antidérapant et un bar supplémentaire pour des accessoires. Le pedalier était améliorer est légèrement different de celle dans la vidéo. Regardez la photo en haut. Le Propel 10' avec système de pédalier allie à la fois stabilité et performance avec une excellente capacité de charge, ce qui en fait un kayak parfait pour tout environnement de pêche. Dim: 10'' x 34" x 14.6" Poids: 63lbs avec siège et système de pédale 93lbs Capacité: 308lbs Ce kayak de 10'pieds de long, 34 pouces de large et 14.6 pouces d'épaisseur est très stable, conçu idéalement pour les pêcheurs kayakistes. Equipé d’un système à pédales haut de gamme qui permet de propulser l’embarcation comme un vélo. Chaque pièce du pédalier est faite de matériaux amovibles, robustes et garantis. Le poids du kayak sans le siège et la commande de pédale est 69lbs avec la commande de pédale et le siège il est un total de 93lbs Avec 4 poignées de transport dont 1 à l’avant, 1 à l’arrière et 1 de chaque côté, il est facile à transporter et à manoeuvrer. Équipé d'un large siège surélevé avec le rabattage en tissu très confortable, l’assise est réglable sur 2 niveaux pour vous garder au sec. Il est équipé d'une porte canne à pêche pivotant également de 3 portes canne à pêche répartie sur les côtés. Il est équipé d’un porte gobelet et de 2 caissons étanches, parfaits pour ranger vos effets personnels, clefs ou téléphone cellulaire par exemple. À l’arrière, il est doté d’un large espace de rangement Des bouchons répartis le long du kayak permettent d’ouvrir, au besoin, l’évacuation de l’eau se trouvant sur le pont. Un élastique permet d’attacher votre pagaie sur le bord du kayak et ainsi de vous libérer les mains La coque est garantie 5 ans et les fixations 1 an. Ce kayak est conçu en polyéthylène et roto-moulé dans un seul morceau. C’est un kayak très solide, versatile et durable. Garantie et Entretien de Yanes #lang2: Réserver un kayak avec un dépôt de 50$, balance payable à réception Click Here for a Transport Quote PRICE MATCH guarantee with specialized staff AFFIRM Financing is available The Propulse 10' with pedal system is a very solid, versatile and durable kayak. The elevated seat will keep you comfortable and dry though out all your fishing excursions Dim: 10' x 34" x 14.6" Weight : 63lbs with seat and pedal system 93lbs total Capacity: 308lbs This video is the Propulse10 that differs esthetically from the Propel. The Propel does not have the antislip carpet nor the extra side bar for accessories. The pedal system has been modified and is slightly different the the one in the video. There is a picture above. This fishing kayak is 10'10 long, 34''wide, 14'' thick, it is very stable, ideally designed for fishing. Delux pedal system The weight of the kayak without the seat and the pedal drive is 69lbs with the pedal drive and seat it is a total of 93lbs. and an additional with 4 carrying handles including 1 at the front, 1 at the back and 1 on each side, it is very easy to carry. Equipped with a large folding elevated seat designed with an aerated fabric for the utmost comfort. The seat is adjustable on 2 levels to always keep you dry. There is a swivel fishing rod holder as well as 3 fishing rod holders on the back of either side of the seat. It is equipped with a cup holder and 2 watertight containers, perfect for storing your personal belongings, keys or cell phone for example. At the rear, it has ample storage There are 6 plugs along that can be opened if necessary to drain water that has accumulated on the deck. An elastic allows you to attach your paddle to the edge of the kayak to free up your hands. The anti slip carpets provide a better footing. The hull is guaranteed 5 years and components 1 year. This kayak is designed in polyethylene and is roto-molded in one piece. It is a very solid, versatile and durable kayak. Yanes Warranty and Maitenance

Fin drive pedal system: Provides hands-free casting and smooth propulsion, reducing fatigue

Stable W-hull shape: Supports both seated and standing casting for versatile angling

Sections: 2 (front and back)

media.alt_text: Custom

variants.title: Raptor 9.5ft Fin Drive Modular Fishing Kayak

description.plain: If you don't have a garage, a truck, or a second person to help you — the Raptor 9.5ft is built for your life. It splits into two 35lb sections that carry like luggage, fit in a hatchback boot, and stand in an apartment hallway. No roof rack. No wall mount. Clip it together in 5 minutes and you're fishing. No roof rack required. Each section is short enough to slide into the boot of a hatchback, SUV, or pickup bed. Verified by customers to fit in a Honda Odyssey, Toyota RAV4, and Ford Edge — no external racks, no foam pads, no tie-downs. Store it where you live. Both sections stand upright against a wall, lean in a hallway, or slide under a bed. Reel Yaks customers routinely store the Raptor in a one-bedroom apartment — something impossible with a traditional one-piece kayak or an inflatable that needs drying time after every use. Fish hands-free. The fin drive pedal system keeps your hands free while you cast, position, and fight fish. The W-hull is wide enough for standing casts in calm to moderate conditions. A 380lb weight capacity handles you, your gear, and your catch. Specs Length: 9.5ft | Sections: 2-piece Weight per section: ~35lbs | Total weight: ~70lbs Capacity: 380lbs Drive: Fin drive (hands-free pedal) Hull: Rotomolded polyethylene — same material as traditional rigid kayaks Assembly: 5 minutes, no tools required Transport: Fits in car boot — no roof rack needed Storage: Sections stand upright in apartment, hallway, or spare room What's Included 1x 9.5ft Raptor kayak (2 sections) 1x Fin drive pedal system 1x Kayak paddle 1x Rod holder 2x Flush mount rod holders 4x Rail accessory tracks 1x Forward hatch 1x Stadium seat Carry handles (bow, stern, sides) Scupper plugs Frequently Asked Questions Will the Raptor fit in my car without a roof rack? Yes. The two sections fit in the boot of most mid-size cars including the Honda Odyssey, Toyota RAV4, Ford Edge, and similar SUVs and hatchbacks. No roof rack, foam pads, or tie-down straps required. Can I store it in my apartment? Yes. Each section fits through a standard doorway. Most customers stand the two sections against a wall in a hallway, spare room, or on a balcony. No wall brackets or ceiling hoists needed. How long does assembly take? About 5 minutes. The front and rear sections click together with the proprietary modular clip system — no tools, no bolts. If you can do it once, you can do it every time. Can I stand up in the Raptor to cast? Yes, in calm to moderate conditions. The W-hull is designed for stability. Most anglers stand comfortably on flat water, lakes, and sheltered bays. It's not recommended in heavy chop or swell. What's the difference between fin drive and propeller drive? Fin drive is quieter and performs better in shallow water — ideal for fishing situations where you don't want to spook fish. Propeller drive gives you instant reverse, which is better for docking and maneuvering near structure. If you're unsure, fin drive is the more popular choice for fishing. Is the modular connection watertight? Yes. Each section is watertight and lock together with proprietary modular clips and create a watertight seal. The Raptor is rotomolded polyethylene — the same construction as traditional one-piece kayaks — with no compromise to hull integrity.
